name: Mangools
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Non Profit, Public Administrations, Small Business
description:
What Mangools Does?

Mangools' SERPWatcher tool provides powerful capabilities and advantages, empowering SEO professionals and businesses to effectively monitor, analyze, and optimize keyword rankings across diverse locations while comprehensively measuring performance.

GetApp

‍

Features of Mangools' SERPWatcher Tool:

➡️ Provides daily updates on keyword rankings.

➡️ Supports local rank tracking for 50,000 locations.

➡️ Introduces a proprietary Performance Index metric to measure SERP performance.

Benefits:

⭐️ Offers real-time insights into keyword performance.

⭐️ Enables precise optimization with local rank tracking.

⭐️ Evaluates overall SERP performance with a comprehensive metric.

Pros:

✅ The tool is quick to create an intutive report for an overall Google performance download

Cons:

❌ Might take some time to getting used to

‍

Priced at $29 Per Month
